height_to_width.desc: 塔高/底边宽（五层方塔应明显竖向）

window_wall_ratio.desc: 塔身开窗比例（窄缝/竖窗为主）

aiInstruction: Vertical LlmPlan: square MASS_MAIN (width=depth, shape=rectangle) with height≈floor_count×floor_height (default 5×3=15). Add TERRACE or PLAZA on top for roof platform. skeleton_type=VERTICAL_STACK. Output proportion_hints with floor_count, floor_height, slenderness. ENTRANCE at ground + FACADE_WINDOWS on tower faces. Do NOT use a single circular TOWER blob for 方塔.
